src/test/java/com/duffel/sdk/DuffelInteg.general_idea: Renamed the test method to use 'DuffelAccount' instead of 'WiseAccount' to align with the correct service terminology.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
Replace javax.annotation-api with jakarta.annotation-api to comply with Jakarta EE namespace requirements for modern Spring/JDK versions.
Configure OpenAPI generator to use Jakarta EE annotations instead of Java EE to ensure generated code compiles with the new dependencies.
Upgrade Spring Framework and Spring Security to versions 6.x which require Java 17+ and Jakarta EE.
Upgrade Hibernate Validator to 8.0.0.Final to match Jakarta Bean Validation API requirements.
Upgrade Jackson libraries to 2.16.0 to ensure compatibility with newer Java features and security patches.
Upgrade Lombok to 1.18.30 to support Java 21 language features.
Update various Maven plugins (compiler, surefire, deploy, etc.) to versions compatible with Java 21 and modern build standards.
Upgrade OpenAPI Generator to 7.1.0 to leverage latest code generation improvements and Jakarta support.
Add type and import mappings in OpenAPI generator to map OffsetDateTime to LocalDateTime and Double to BigDecimal for better precision and time handling.
Correct a typo in the Maven Assembly Plugin version property name.
Rename the project from 'Wise' to 'Duffel' and update version to 0.0.5-SNAPSHOT to reflect the new branding and development cycle.
Add configuration to keep staging repository on close rule failure for easier debugging of release issues.

pom.xml.upgrade_threetenbp: Upgrade threetenbp to 1.6.8 for better date/time handling compatibility.
pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade threetenbp to 1.6.8 for better date/time handling compatibility.

README.md.general_idea: Removed obsolete configuration instructions for a URL property that is no longer required.
README.md.human_impl: Removed 'duffel.url' from the properties list and deleted the paragraph explaining how to obtain it via profiles.

README.md.general_idea: Corrected a typo in the documentation referring to the wrong bean name.
README.md.human_impl: Changed 'Wise-beans' to 'Duffel-beans' in the Spring injection instructions.

README.md.general_idea: Improved readability of the README header and links.
README.md.human_impl: Converted the raw Postman URL into a Markdown link and added a note about the supported Duffel version.
